sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87598" key="prokaqarieu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκᾰθᾰριεύω</orth>, <sense id="n87598.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keep oneself pure before,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:7:26:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.26.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
